example_prompt: Enrol a customer into a recurring billing plan so they are automatically charged on each due date.

subscriptionPlanId.description: ID of the subscription plan created via create_subscription_plan.

startDate.description: Date of the first installment charge in YYYY-MM-DD format. Must be today or a future date.

customerId.description: UUID of the customer to enrol. The customer must exist in Bictorys.

reference.description: Optional merchant reference for this subscription instance.

notificationChannel.description: How Bictorys notifies the customer before each charge. Default: none.

nextInstallmentDueDate.description: Date when the next charge will be triggered.

currentInstallmentStatus.description: Payment state of the current installment: pending, succeeded, failed, etc.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the billing microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/billing/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
You must create the subscription plan first (create_subscription_plan) and the customer must exist in Bictorys before calling this endpoint. Both are required by ID.
startDate must be today or a future date in YYYY-MM-DD format. A past date is rejected.
Bictorys triggers charges automatically on each installment due date based on the plan's installmentIntervalDays. You do not need to initiate charges manually.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
